description: This pipeline performs image processing and analysis, applying various operations such as Euclidean distance transforms, watershed algorithms, and conversions between different image representations to extract and visualize features from input images, ultimately generating output overlays and region of interest definitions.

984710fe-ef6b-49ff-8b04-91ac4d41e7a0.name: ij1-math-edt2d
984710fe-ef6b-49ff-8b04-91ac4d41e7a0.description: Applies a euclidean distance transform on binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

0089aa79-24a4-42ee-b3b7-af434fd73853.name: ij1-labels-to-rgb
0089aa79-24a4-42ee-b3b7-af434fd73853.description: Visualizes a labels image by assigning a color to each label component

6d03873e-2a91-4a72-95bd-6cc5fadde3e8.name: ij1-roi-from-mask
6d03873e-2a91-4a72-95bd-6cc5fadde3e8.description: Converts pixel values equal or higher than the given threshold to a ROI. This will create a single ROI that contains holes. If a higher-dimensional image is provided, the operation is applied for each slice.

df5f5bdd-a3fa-49fa-bd17-67390ce06225.name: ij1-segment-seeded-watershed
df5f5bdd-a3fa-49fa-bd17-67390ce06225.description:
Performs segmentation via watershed on a 2D or 3D image using flooding simulations. Please note that this node returns labels instead of masks. The markers need to be labels, so apply a connected components labeling if you only have masks.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

3a2f6689-a5be-499d-ab8c-28963101fe21.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
3a2f6689-a5be-499d-ab8c-28963101fe21.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

b674d9ad-c709-46fb-acf8-0a14e58b3dd6.name: ij1-roi-to-mask
b674d9ad-c709-46fb-acf8-0a14e58b3dd6.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

b77f3b7d-f29f-4414-a15b-ba1b6a6ad237.name: ij1-binary-dtwatershed2d
b77f3b7d-f29f-4414-a15b-ba1b6a6ad237.description: Applies an euclidean distance transform on binary images. Then applies a watershed algorithm.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
